title: Nutanix's stock is down after HPE says there are 'no discussions' for an acquisition
text: Shares of Nutanix Inc. NTNX, -6.40% tumbled 6% Friday after long-rumored acquirer Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. HPE, -0.70% told MarketWatch there are "no discussions" to buy the cloud-computing company. Earlier this month, Bloomberg reported HPE held on-and-off talks with Nutanix following pressure from hedge fund investor Legion Partners Asset Management for Nutanix to explore a sale.

title: HPE's Aruba Powers Walt Disney Resort's Star Wars Adventure
text: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Aruba advanced infrastructure to power Walt Disney World Resort's first ever Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser vacation experience.

title: It's Out of This World: Aruba Unified Infrastructure Helps Power Walt Disney World® Resort's Newest Star Wars Vacation Experience
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Aruba, a Hewlett Packard Enterprise company (NYSE: HPE), today announced that Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser, a two-night adventure at Walt Disney World® Resort is using Aruba technology to help deliver an entirely new vacation experience.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Enhances GreenLake, Intends Expansion
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) advances GreenLake platform with new application, analytics and developer services. It upgrades HPE GreenLake for Private Cloud Enterprise, expanding its global availability.

title: Lack of Data Capabilities Impedes Organizations' Success, Global Survey Finds
text: FRANKFURT, Germany--( BUSINESS WIRE )--While governments around the world have identified data as a strategic resource to drive economic and social progress1, Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today unveiled global survey results showing that a lack of data maturity hinders both the private and public sector from achieving key outcomes such as growing sales or advancing environmental sustainability.

title: AMD Expands Collaboration With Viettel Group for 5G Network
text: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) expands its partnership with Viettel High Tech to address high-growth markets like 5G networking.
